space.title: A green oasis in the city
space.desc: Tropical Chill is more than just a coffee shop — it's a place to escape the urban buzz and immerse yourself in a cool tropical setting. With an open design, lush greenery, and natural light, it's the perfect spot for work, meetings, or simply unwinding.

items.text: Super chill vibes, the drinks look amazing and taste even better. Will definitely come back regularly.
items.name: Minh Anh

items.text: My favorite is the Tropical Tea — the summer heat melts away after the first sip. Staff is very friendly.
items.name: Hoàng Nam

items.text: The cafe has so many great photo spots. Drinks are reasonably priced for the quality and amazing atmosphere.
items.name: Phương Thảo
